# Erupt Vote Plugin

A voting plugin supporting multiple voting scenarios such as surveys, opinion gathering, and selection events. Built with Erupt annotation-driven development to rapidly construct voting systems.

| | |
|---|---|
| Backend Code | [https://gitee.com/PPLINGHUFEI/erupt-vote](https://gitee.com/PPLINGHUFEI/erupt-vote) |
| Frontend Code | [https://gitee.com/PPLINGHUFEI/erupt-vote-web](https://gitee.com/PPLINGHUFEI/erupt-vote-web) |

## Contact

- QQ: 884700965
- WeChat: Misakimashino

## Quick Start

Clone the backend source code (no need to clone the frontend source code) and run:

```bash
mvn install
```
